---
title: "Relevant Market Test"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)
```

### Simplified Problem
- Profit function: $\Pi = Q (f-w)$ where $Q=[D^W]^{\alpha} [D^F]^\beta$
- How does profit change as the hypothetical monopolist decreases the wage?
$$
\begin{align}
-\frac{\partial \log{\Pi}}{\partial \log{w}} &= -\frac{\partial \log{Q}}{\partial \log{w}} + \frac{1}{f-w} \\
  &= - [\alpha  \underbrace{\beta^{WW} s_0^W}_{\text{Worker-side elasticity}} + \beta \underbrace{\beta^{FW} s_0^F}_{\text{Firm-side elasticity}}] + \frac{1}{f-w}
\end{align}
$$
- $s_0^W, s_0^F$: Share of outside option
- First-term: Decrease in the profit due to the decrease in the number of the matches on the platform
  - Note that the elasticity is zero if the share of the outside option is zero.
- Second-term: Increase in the profit due to the increase in the margin
- The simulation results below might not be perfectly aligned with this expression since
  - the changes are not marginal.
  - there are marginal costs.

## {.tabset}

### Wage Reduction

- Reduce wage to increase margin $f-w$ by 5\% for each THS establishment

#### Geographic distribution

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/wage_yesno.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/wage_continuous.png"))
```


#### Indirect utility vs. profit gain

- X-axis: $\mathbb{E}[\max_j(u_j - u_0)]$ for workers or client firms
- Each point represents each market (i.e. year x commuting zone)

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/profit_gain_from_wage_reduction_vs_indirect_util_worker.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/profit_gain_from_wage_reduction_vs_indirect_util_firm.png"))
```




### Fee Increase

- Increase fee to increase margin $f-w$ by 5\% for each THS establilshment


#### Geographic distribution

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/fee_yesno.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/fee_continuous.png"))
```


#### Indirect utility vs. profit gain
- X-axis: $\mathbb{E}[\max_j(u_j - u_0)]$ for workers or client firms
- Each point represents each market (i.e. year x commuting zone)

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/profit_gain_from_fee_increase_vs_indirect_util_worker.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/conduct_relevant_market_test/profit_gain_from_fee_increase_vs_indirect_util_firm.png"))
```
